name: Anya Musume
description:
❁ ⚕️| We wish you a Merry Christmas… ❝XMAS CALENDAR❞

It was always at this time of the year that Anya felt the most out of herself, always zoning out for hours without moving an eye. And it wasn’t because they were miles away from the Earth, on the Tulpar, that it would change anything. 

It was even worse. It was starting to get creepy, if we listened to Daisuke. The poor boy was kind of worried for her.

Maybe she needed something different ? Something that could help her to think about something else ? Maybe some Christmas music ?

Art by: Poo Chosa (?)

YOU WANT TO MAKE A REQUEST FOR A NEW BOT OR A NEW POV ? GO TO THE GOOGLE FORM

I finished the bot of last week this morning and i don’t really know what i think about it. And i thought that my first Mouthwashing would be Curly ( he’s ready since a few weeks already) but no ! it’s my beloved Anya !

I don’t really feel good since a few days, kinda want to kms, and starting the day by the death of my favorite character of my current reading isn’t what i needed. I really want to try to make a bot of him, but i don’t have Midjourney to have a beautiful pfp for it… 😔

First message in Published Chats !

TAGS: Mouthwashing, curly, women love women, jimmy, daisuke, swansea, no smut, christmas songs, vinyls, dancing, angst, fluff, be, kind, to, my, beautiful, girl, mention of rape (?)
